name: Apple-Date Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Apple, unpeeled and chopped (about 1 small apple)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Betty Crocker's Homemade Quick Breads
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Using a pastry blender, cut the margarine into the flour mixture until it resembles fine crumbs. Add sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, oats, apple, and dates; stir until combined. Beat in the egg, then add enough half and half so that the dough forms a ball when turned onto a lightly floured surface. Roll out on an ungreased cookie sheet to form an 8-inch circle. Cut into wedges without separating them. Brush with half and half and sprinkle with sugar if desired. Bake for 16 to 18 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately and carefully separate the wedges. Serve warm.
